name: [SUBJECT-21] Add direct curriculum retry endpoint coverage evidence
description: Track the remaining curriculum retry pass-with-issues row where source/adjacent flow checks passed but the retry endpoint lacks direct flow evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: SUBJECT-21 has direct route or browser-equivalent deterministic coverage for the curriculum retry endpoint; adjacent-only/source-only rationale is removed or explicitly justified; master flow plan row references this item.
riskImpact: Retry behavior is a recovery path; without direct evidence, a broken retry could be hidden by adjacent successful subject flows.
